allow: PowerShell(try { git push -u origin feature/ui-cand-refresh -ErrorAction Stop } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
PowerShell($result = git push -u origin feature/ui-cand-refresh 2>&1; $result | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\(\) })

Bash(python -c "import jinja2,glob; e=jinja2.Environment\(\); [e.parse\(open\(f,encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) or print\('OK',f\) for f in glob.glob\('frontend/templates/profile/*.html'\)+['frontend/templates/network/index.html','frontend/templates/ra_soat/index.html','frontend/templates/ra_soat/_results.html']]")

PowerShell(python -c "from jinja2 import Environment, FileSystemLoader; e=Environment\(loader=FileSystemLoader\('frontend/templates'\)\); [print\('OK' if \(lambda f: \(e.parse\(open\('frontend/templates/'+f,encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\), True\)\)\(f\) else '',f\) for f in ['audit_log/index.html','quan_ly_user/index.html','nguon_du_lieu/index.html','bao_cao/index.html','lich_su_kien/index.html','auth/change_password.html']]")

PowerShell($env:GIT_TRACE = ""; $env:GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT = "0"; $env:GCM_INTERACTIVE = "never"; git -c credential.helper="!gh auth git-credential" push origin feature/ui-cand-refresh 2>&1 | Out-String)
